examples.title: Intermediate SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 3C Pattern
examples.code:
-- SQL Database query for SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 3C
SELECT id, title, category, created_at
FROM application_records
WHERE category = 'SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 3C' AND is_active = 1
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
